nasb.text: “You shall celebrate the Feast of Booths seven days after you have gathered in from your threshing floor and your wine vat;

esv.text: “You shall keep the Feast of Booths seven days, when you have gathered in the produce from your threshing floor and your winepress.

cnv.text: “你從禾場上和榨酒池裡收藏了出產以後，就要舉行住棚節七日。

ccb.text: “在收藏好谷物和新酒后，你们要守七天的住棚节。
